_comment: livox_ros2_driver config for the Horizon (SDK1). Set the real broadcast_code from the device label or discover it with scripts/discover_horizon_broadcast_code.sh. The broadcast code is 14 serial chars + 1 extra char = 15 chars total.

lidar_config._imu_rate_note: 1 = IMU enabled/streaming. Confirm IMU packets appear on /livox/imu; people often miss the Horizon IMU because it's a separate topic from the cloud.
